'''Pacnorval Defense Systems, Limited''' was a small weapons manufacturer that specialized in the production of [[Sonic pistol|sonic weapons]]. It had been in existence from the time of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]] where it produced weapons and armor for the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] police. It was originally formed to create weapons and other devices for security forces of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]].<ref name="NEGWT">''[[The New Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]''</ref>
